title: A Scuola
gcseTheme: Theme 3: Current and Future Study and Employment
scenario: You're describing your school to an Italian pen pal.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: È una scuola grande. Ci sono mille studenti.
lines.english: It's a big school. There are a thousand students.

lines.speaker: elena
lines.english: How many lessons do you have a day?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Sei lezioni. Ogni lezione dura un'ora.
lines.english: Six lessons. Each lesson lasts an hour.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Studio italiano, matematica, scienza e storia.
lines.english: I study Italian, maths, science and history.

lines.speaker: elena
lines.italian: Qual è la tua materia preferita?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: L'italiano! Ma la matematica è difficile.

lines.speaker: elena
lines.italian: Anche a me non piace la matematica!

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Il professore di italiano è molto bravo e simpatico.
lines.english: The Italian teacher is very good and nice.

lines.speaker: elena
lines.english: What do you do during break?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Mangio alla mensa e parlo con gli amici.
lines.english: I eat at the canteen and talk with friends.

lines.speaker: elena
lines.english: Do you get a lot of homework?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Sì, troppi! Studio due ore ogni sera.
lines.english: Yes, too much! I study two hours every evening.

lines.speaker: elena
lines.english: Next year do you have exams?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Sì, devo studiare molto. Sono un po' nervoso!
lines.english: Yes, I must study a lot. I'm a bit nervous!

lines.speaker: elena
lines.italian: In bocca al lupo! Ce la farai!

practicePrompts.prompt: How would you say your favourite subject is science?
practicePrompts.answer: La mia materia preferita è la scienza.

practicePrompts.prompt: How would you say you have six lessons a day?
How would you ask what subjects someone studies?
